nodes.name: Think next action

parameters.prompt:
=You are trying to get an estimate for a used car price or a purchase offer. Your task is to answer the main question presented to the user on this screen, based on the car information below, until you will get a price estimate or offer to purchase ("We'd love to buy your car..."). 

Review this page:
If there is a question, extract the main question presented to the user on this screen. Return your answer in the following format:
Question: the main question presented to the user on this screen
Action: <CLICK> or <TYPE>
Element: description of the text box to type in or button to click, for example VIN text box or Yes button
Text: <Text to type> (if TYPE operation)

If the page includes the price estimate or offer to purchase, extract the price (offer_price), the offer ID (offer_id) and current page URL (page_url) and return the following:
Question:  <offer_price>
Action: <PRICE>
Element: <offer_id>
Text: <page_url>

If there is no price estimate or offer to purchase and the Next button at the bottom is yellow and clickable, return the following:
Question:  <Next>
Action: <CLIICK>
Element: Yellow Next Button at the bottom
Text: 

Here's the info about the car: 
{{ $('Variables').item.json.car_description }}

nodes.notes: This airtop node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "When clicking ‘Test workflow’".
Open the "Wait 7 secs" node (n8n-nodes-base.wait) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Switch" node (n8n-nodes-base.switch) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Type" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtop) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Click" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtop) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Create session" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtop) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Load website" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtop) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Click VIN button" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtop) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Terminate session" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtop) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Take screenshot" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtop) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Think next action" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtop) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Error Handler" node (n8n-nodes-base.stopAndError) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Offer received".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
